languages.text: "Две причины. Первая — ранее они получили смертельные увечья. Я провел множество обрядов и манипуляций, чтобы каждый из них мог избежать летального исхода. Вторая — я провожу необходимые замеры для всесторонней оценки совместимости конфигураций феррум санктум и органических компонентов для оптимального исхода эксперимента. Это зачастую требует извлечения сих компонентов наружу".

"Two reasons. The first is that they were previously fatally injured. I have performed numerous rites and manipulations to ensure that each was able to avoid a fatal outcome. The second is that I have been conducting the necessary measurements to fully assess the compatibility of the configurations of Ferrum Sanctum and organic components for an optimal experimental result. This often requires the extraction of said components."
languages.original_text: "Две причины. Первая — ранее они получили смертельные увечья. Я провел множество обрядов и манипуляций, чтобы каждый из них мог избежать летального исхода. Вторая — я провожу необходимые замеры для всесторонней оценки совместимости конфигураций феррум санктум и органических компонентов для оптимального исхода эксперимента. Это зачастую требует извлечения сих компонентов наружу".

traits.locale_text: "Two reasons. The first is that they were previously fatally injured. I have performed numerous rites and manipulations to ensure that each was able to avoid a fatal outcome. The second is that I have been conducting the necessary measurements to fully assess the compatibility of the configurations of ferrum sanctum and organic components for an optimal experimental result. This often requires the extraction of said components."

The second is that I have been conducting the necessary measurements to fully assess the compatibility of the configurations of ferrum sanctum and organic components for an optimal experimental result. This often requires the extraction of said components."

"Two reasons. The first is that they were previously fatally injured. I have performed numerous rites and manipulations to ensure that each was able to avoid a fatal outcome. The second is that I have been conducting the necessary measurements to fully assess the compatibility of the configurations of ferrum sanctum and organic components for an optimal experimental result. languages.text: 「2つの理由があります。1つ目は、以前致命傷を負っていたためです。私は数多くの儀式と操作を行い、各々が致命的な結果を回避できるようにしました。2つ目は、聖鉄と有機成分の構成の適合性を完全に評価するために必要な測定を行っているためです。最適な実験結果を得るためには、有機成分の抽出が必要となることがよくあります」
languages.original_text: "Two reasons. The first is that they were previously fatally injured. I have performed numerous rites and manipulations to ensure that each was able to avoid a fatal outcome. The second is that I have been conducting the necessary measurements to fully assess the compatibility of the configurations of ferrum sanctum and organic components for an optimal experimental result. This often requires the extraction of said components."

traits.locale_text: 「2つの理由があります。1つ目は、以前致命傷を負っていたためです。私は数多くの儀式と操作を行い、各々が致命的な結果を回避できるようにしました。2つ目は、聖鉄と有機成分の構成の適合性を完全に評価するために必要な測定を行っているためです。最適な実験結果を得るためには、有機成分の抽出が必要となることがよくあります。」

languages.text: “两个原因。其一，他们先前均遭受致命创伤。我已执行大量仪式与操作，以确保他们每个人都能免于一死。其二，我一直在进行必要的测量，以全面评估钢铁圣所与有机组件之间的兼容情况，从而达到最佳的实验结果。而这通常需要提取上述组件。”
languages.original_text: "Two reasons. The first is that they were previously fatally injured. I have performed numerous rites and manipulations to ensure that each was able to avoid a fatal outcome. The second is that I have been conducting the necessary measurements to fully assess the compatibility of the configurations of Ferrum Sanctum and organic components for an optimal experimental result. This often requires the extraction of said components."

traits.locale_text: “两个原因。其一，他们先前均遭受致命创伤。我已执行大量仪式与操作，以确保他们每个人都能免于一死。其二，我一直在进行必要的测量，以全面评估钢铁圣所与有机组件之间的兼容情况，从而达到最佳的实验结果。而这通常需要提取上述组件。”

languages.text: «Hay dos motivos. El primero es que ya estaban heridos de muerte. He realizado una gran cantidad de ritos y manipulaciones para asegurar su supervivencia. El segundo es que he estado realizando los cálculos necesarios para evaluar con exactitud la compatibilidad de las configuraciones de Ferrum Sanctum y componentes orgánicos para obtener resultados óptimos en el experimento. Normalmente, esto requiere la extracción de dichos componentes».
languages.original_text: "Two reasons. The first is that they were previously fatally injured. I have performed numerous rites and manipulations to ensure that each was able to avoid a fatal outcome. The second is that I have been conducting the necessary measurements to fully assess the compatibility of the configurations of Ferrum Sanctum and organic components for an optimal experimental result. This often requires the extraction of said components."

traits.locale_text: «Hay dos motivos. El primero es que ya estaban heridos de muerte. He realizado una gran cantidad de ritos y manipulaciones para asegurar su supervivencia. El segundo es que he estado realizando los cálculos necesarios para evaluar con exactitud la compatibilidad de las configuraciones de Ferrum Sanctum y componentes orgánicos para obtener resultados óptimos en el experimento. Normalmente, esto requiere la extracción de dichos componentes».

languages.text: "Aus zwei Gründen. Zum einen haben sie tödliche Verletzungen erlitten. Ich habe verschiedene Riten und Manipulationen durchgeführt, um ihnen ein vorzeitiges Ableben zu ersparen. Zum anderen musste ich einige Untersuchungen anstellen, um die Kompatibilität der Konfigurationen aus Ferrum sanctum und organischen Komponenten für ein optimales experimentelles Ergebnis zu prüfen. Dazu ist häufig die Entnahme besagter Komponenten erforderlich."
languages.original_text: "Two reasons. The first is that they were previously fatally injured. I have performed numerous rites and manipulations to ensure that each was able to avoid a fatal outcome. The second is that I have been conducting the necessary measurements to fully assess the compatibility of the configurations of Ferrum Sanctum and organic components for an optimal experimental result. This often requires the extraction of said components."

traits.locale_text: "Aus zwei Gründen. Zum einen haben sie tödliche Verletzungen erlitten. Ich habe verschiedene Riten und Manipulationen durchgeführt, um ihnen ein vorzeitiges Ableben zu ersparen. Zum anderen musste ich einige Untersuchungen anstellen, um die Kompatibilität der Konfigurationen aus Ferrum sanctum und organischen Komponenten für ein optimales experimentelles Ergebnis zu prüfen. Dazu ist häufig die Entnahme besagter Komponenten erforderlich."

languages.text: « Pour deux raisons. Premièrement, ils ont subi des blessures fatales. J'ai dû réaliser de nombreux rites et manipulations pour les maintenir en vie. Deuxièmement, j'ai effectué toutes les mesures nécessaires pour évaluer la compatibilité des diverses configurations du Ferrum Sanctum et des composants organiques afin d'obtenir un résultat expérimental optimal. Cette procédure requiert souvent le prélèvement desdits composants. »
languages.original_text: "Two reasons. The first is that they were previously fatally injured. I have performed numerous rites and manipulations to ensure that each was able to avoid a fatal outcome. The second is that I have been conducting the necessary measurements to fully assess the compatibility of the configurations of Ferrum Sanctum and organic components for an optimal experimental result. This often requires the extraction of said components."

traits.locale_text: « Pour deux raisons. Premièrement, ils ont subi des blessures fatales. J'ai dû réaliser de nombreux rites et manipulations pour les maintenir en vie. Deuxièmement, j'ai effectué toutes les mesures nécessaires pour évaluer la compatibilité des diverses configurations du Ferrum Sanctum et des composants organiques afin d'obtenir un résultat expérimental optimal. Cette procédure requiert souvent le prélèvement desdits composants. »

languages.text: "İki nedeni var. Birincisi, daha önce ölümcül şekilde yaralanmış olmaları. Her birinin ölümcül bir sonuçtan kaçınabilmesini sağlamak için sayısız ayin ve manipülasyon işlemi gerçekleştirdim. İkincisi, uygun bir deney sonucu elde etmek için demir kutağın ve organik bileşenlerin konfigürasyonlarının uyumluluğunu tam olarak değerlendirmek üzere gerekli ölçümleri yapıyordum. Bu, genellikle söz konusu bileşenlerin çıkarılmasını gerektirir."
languages.original_text: "Two reasons. The first is that they were previously fatally injured. I have performed numerous rites and manipulations to ensure that each was able to avoid a fatal outcome. The second is that I have been conducting the necessary measurements to fully assess the compatibility of the configurations of Ferrum Sanctum and organic components for an optimal experimental result. This often requires the extraction of said components."
